attraction_name: Hangzhou Hubin Intime in77 Zone A
description: A well-known shopping center in Hangzhou, located by West Lake, featuring a wide range of brands and convenient transportation.
The most famous of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a lakeside causeway built under the supervision of Su Dongpo, renowned for its willow trees in spring.
A large musical fountain located in Lakeside Park No. 3, offering spectacular nighttime performances synchronized with music.
China's first national wetland park, boasting beautiful ecological environments and a filming location for the movie 'If You Are the One'.
Hangzhou's historic cultural pedestrian street, preserving the street layout from the Southern Song Dynasty, ideal for leisurely strolls.

attraction_name: China Knife, Scissors, and Sword Museum
description: A specialized museum showcasing the craftsmanship of Chinese knives, scissors, and swords, offering insights into Hangzhou's traditional handicraft culture.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, located on Xiaoyingzhou Island, named for the reflection of three stone pagodas resembling moons.
Hangzhou's most representative historic cultural district, retaining Ming and Qing architectural styles and featuring a variety of unique shops.

attraction_name: China Academy of Art Xiangshan Campus
description: A renowned art academy with distinctive architectural design, perfect for art enthusiasts to visit.
A well-preserved historic district featuring typical Jiangnan water town architecture and a strong sense of local life.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, the legendary meeting place of Bai Suzhen and Xu Xian, marking the northern starting point of West Lake.

attraction_name: Southern Song Imperial Street Zhongshan Road Pedestrian Street
description: A modern pedestrian street built on the ruins of the Southern Song Dynasty imperial city, blending historical culture with contemporary commerce.
An important natural science museum in East China, showcasing a rich collection of exhibits.
A museum displaying traditional and modern handicrafts from Hangzhou, including silk, embroidery, carving, and various other art forms.
A unique peak in front of Lingyin Temple, featuring abundant stone carvings and distinctive geological landscapes.
A reconstructed ancient pagoda with a thousand-year history, offering panoramic views of West Lake and closely tied to the legend of 'The Legend of the White Snake'.
A famous ancient Buddhist temple in China with a history of approximately 1,700 years, known for its thriving incense offerings and magnificent architecture.
